name: codex-rate-limits
description: Check current Codex ChatGPT subscription rate-limit windows.

interface.shortDescription: Reads current 5h and Weekly Codex usage windows.
interface.longDescription: Uses the local codex app-server JSON-RPC API to report current ChatGPT subscription rate limits without UI scraping.
defaultPrompt: Check my 5h and weekly Codex rate limits.
Do I have Codex room left today?
Show my current Codex subscription usage windows.
